who: logistics managers in freight brokerage firms managing 5-15 vehicles
offer: For logistics managers in freight brokerage firms managing 5-15 vehicles, inefficient vehicle usage causes increased maintenance costs. We provide a fleet management dashboard instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets.
problem: inefficient vehicle usage and maintenance tracking
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities where logistics managers seek advice
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to logistics managers with a demo video
Community forums where logistics managers share tools
try_it: Let users try vehicle usage monitoring and alerts for 1-3 vehicles
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Produce a demo video showing the manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: CSV import for existing vehicle data
